_meta.purpose: Closing sentences in English for 32 pearls dental world. Natural wrap-up — recommendation, return plan, or simple sign-off.
rules: Mix short sign-offs with fuller recommendations
Recommendations should sound like telling a friend, not writing an ad
Some endings mention family — fits multi-dentist clinic
Don't end every review with a recommendation — mix it up
